text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I have to say, I didn't think you'd really
do it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you really did try hard. I guess you don't
like to lose either.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, don't worry. I'll take good care of it. Seeing
as you went to all that trouble and all.
